SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.subsea

Class StidWellBarrierDataSource

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.subsea.StidWellBarrierDataSource
public class StidWellBarrierDataSource extends Object
Normalized STID tag-and-document JSON bridge that builds a WellBarrierSchematic from externally normalized well-barrier evidence.

This class does not connect to STID or document-management systems directly. Those systems should normalize their well tag registers, barrier-element lists, and cross-referenced documents into JSON and pass it to this deterministic Java adapter, so the resulting barrier schematic stays fully traceable and offline-reproducible. No live inference is performed; the screening output is intended for human review.

Expected JSON shape (all keys optional): 

 {
   "wellId": "WELL-A1",
   "wellType": "OIL_PRODUCER",
   "installationCode": "AAA",
   "annulusMonitoringRequired": true,
   "minPrimaryElements": 2,
   "minSecondaryElements": 2,
   "primaryEnvelope": {
     "name": "Primary",
     "elements": [
       { "type": "TUBING", "name": "Production Tubing", "status": "INTACT", "verified": true, "depthMD": 2500.0 },
       { "type": "DHSV", "name": "SCSSV", "status": "INTACT", "verified": true, "depthMD": 350.0 },
       { "type": "XMAS_TREE", "name": "Subsea Xmas Tree", "status": "INTACT", "verified": true }
     ]
   },
   "secondaryEnvelope": {
     "name": "Secondary",
     "elements": [
       { "type": "CASING", "name": "Production Casing", "status": "INTACT", "verified": true },
       { "type": "CEMENT", "name": "Casing Cement", "status": "INTACT", "verified": true },
       { "type": "WELLHEAD", "name": "Wellhead", "status": "INTACT", "verified": true }
     ]
   }
 }
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
See Also:
  • WellBarrierSchematic
  • WellIntegrityScreening

      public StidWellBarrierDataSource(String json)
      Creates a source from JSON text.
      Parameters:
      json - normalized STID tag-and-document JSON text

    • StidWellBarrierDataSource

      public StidWellBarrierDataSource(com.google.gson.JsonObject source)
      Creates a source from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      source - normalized JSON object, or null for an empty source

  • Method Details

    • getWellId

      public String getWellId()
      Reads the optional well identifier used for traceability.
      Returns:
      well identifier, or empty string when not present

    • getInstallationCode

      public String getInstallationCode()
      Reads the optional installation code used for traceability.
      Returns:
      installation code, or empty string when not present

    • read

      public WellBarrierSchematic read()
      Builds a well barrier schematic from the normalized JSON.
      Returns:
      populated well barrier schematic (never null)

    • buildEnvelope

      private BarrierEnvelope buildEnvelope(com.google.gson.JsonObject record, String defaultName)
      Builds a barrier envelope from a record.
      Parameters:
      record - envelope JSON object
      defaultName - fallback envelope name when none is supplied
      Returns:
      populated barrier envelope

      private BarrierElement buildElement(com.google.gson.JsonObject record)
      Builds a barrier element from a record.

      Returns:
      populated barrier element

    • parseElementType

      private static BarrierElement.ElementType parseElementType(String raw)
      Parses a barrier element type, defaulting to CASING when unrecognized.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw type string
      Returns:
      element type

    • parseStatus

      private static BarrierElement.Status parseStatus(String raw)
      Parses a barrier element status, defaulting to UNKNOWN when unrecognized.
      Parameters:
      raw - raw status string
      Returns:
      element status

    • optString

      private static String optString(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String key, String fallback)
      Reads an optional string field with a default.
      Parameters:
      object - source object
      key - field key
      fallback - default value
      Returns:
      field value, or fallback when missing or null

      object - source object

      fallback - default value

      field value, or fallback when missing or null

    • firstObject

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject firstObject(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String[] keys)
      Returns the first matching object field among candidate keys.
      Parameters:
      object - source object
      keys - candidate keys
      Returns:
      first matching object, or null when none present

      private static com.google.gson.JsonArray firstArray(com.google.gson.JsonObject object, String[] keys)

      keys - candidate keys
      Returns:
      first matching array, or null when none present
